open_questions: unit_00001: chunk is effectively empty (PDF pointer only); no mechanism to map.
unit_00092, unit_00098: armor and constructs (equipment/headquarters) are outside the six spine modules.
unit_00108: GM assigning difficulties is GM procedure, not a concrete Check/DifficultyClass object rule in this excerpt.
unit_00177: new-GM reading guidance; not a spine mechanism.
unit_00264: session/scene narrative structure; not covered by spine modules.
unit_00371: move actions (action economy) is outside the named spine modules.
unit_00401: fragment only (weakened line); insufficient to scaffold a Condition concept beyond parent chunk.
unit_00452, unit_00466, unit_00472: hero points (scene editing, inspiration, earning) are not represented in the current map-model-spec spine concepts.
unit_00597, unit_00603, unit_00621, unit_00638, unit_00646: complications, motivations, injuries—story/HP economy, not mapped to the six modules.
unit_00626: bullet placeholder only; no substantive text.
unit_00665, unit_00671, unit_00679, unit_00711: naming, appearance, alien origin flavor—character creation outside spine mechanics.
unit_00584: NPC effective power level vs. points is GM approximation; relationship to PowerPoints/PowerLevel limits needs parent decision.
cross_cutting_notes: Batch 0 mixes TOC fragments, character-creation chapters, and core rules. Resistance checks and conditions tie Abilities (defense bonuses) to Combat resolution; opposed checks and skill pairings bridge Skills and Checks. Several excerpts are table-of-contents or incomplete lines and should not drive new epics without K-read follow-up.

concept.name: TimeMeasureRow
concept.owns: Owns the ordered list of concrete time durations corresponding to rank steps on the measurements scale.

concept.name: Stamina
concept.owns: Owns physical resilience: applies to Toughness, Fortitude, and Stamina checks when no specific defense applies.

concept.name: Awareness
concept.owns: Owns intuition and common sense: applies to Will, Insight and Perception skill checks, and Awareness checks when no skill applies.

concept.name: AbilityRankPurchase
concept.owns: Owns spending 2 power points per +1 ability rank, subject to power level limits.

concept.name: OpposedCheck
concept.owns: Owns resolving a contest by comparing two check results as the DC, with tie-breakers for equal results.

concept.name: CriticalSuccess
concept.owns: Owns increasing degree of success by one when the d20 shows a natural 20 on a check.

concept.name: ToolingPenalty
concept.owns: Owns imposing -5 on a check without required tools, or -2 with makeshift tools when the GM allows.

concept.name: SkillCatalog
concept.owns: Owns the named default skill list (Acrobatics through Vehicles) as the chapter index for skill descriptions.

concept.name: OpposedSkillPairing
concept.owns: Owns which opposing skill is rolled for common contests (e.g. Stealth vs Perception).

concept.name: Advantage
concept.owns: Owns minor benefits between skills and powers, sometimes ranked, purchased with power points.

concept.name: Descriptor
concept.owns: Owns labels such as origin (mutant, mystic, alien) applied to powers for interaction with effects and devices.

concept.name: ExtraEffortPowerSurge
concept.owns: Owns temporarily increasing one power effect by +1 rank until the start of the hero's next turn.

concept.name: PowerLevel
concept.owns: Owns the series limit that sets starting power points and caps where traits may be spent.

concept.name: BasicCondition
concept.owns: Owns single-modifier status building blocks (e.g. compelled, controlled, dazed, debilitated, defenseless) that compose conditions.

concept.name: InitiativeCheck
concept.owns: Owns ordering turns using d20 plus initiative modifier (Agility + Improved Initiative + power modifiers).

concept.name: ActiveDefenseDegradation
concept.owns: Owns halving Dodge and Parry when vulnerable and reducing both to 0 when defenseless.
